units.content: U.S. Patent No. 10,180,929 B1 exists, titled 'Ontology-based object-type mapping', granted to Palantir Technologies Inc. on 15 January 2019
U.S. Patent No. 10,803,106 B1 exists, titled 'System with modular object management', granted to Palantir Technologies Inc. on 13 October 2020
Both patents are classified as FTO-adjacent Palantir modular-ontology patents
Claim 1 and claim 13 of the referenced patent(s) contain a tightened disclaimer
Disclaimer item (i) excludes ontology-layer subject matter from claim scope
Disclaimer item (ii) excludes object-type and property-type registry subject matter from claim scope
The dual carve-outs in claims 1 and 13 narrow the effective FTO risk surface for ontology-layer and registry implementations
Specification section 4.15 is cited as the locus of the disclaimer language
